author: Crystal Carter
title: The future of AI search: What 6 SEO leaders predict for 2026
content: Article featuring Crystal Carter as one of 6 SEO leaders offering predictions for the future of AI search in 2026. Carter discusses the shift from search engine optimization to AI search visibility, the impact of reasoning models on SEO strategy, and the necessity to optimize for machine readability and API compatibility. The article emphasizes that AI search now handles discovery, decisioning, and transactions, requiring SEOs to expand beyond optimizing for clicks.
